name: Nominal Gravy - Bannerfall SMP
description:
Doesn't she look. . .familiar? II Rogue Katie POV

Nom hasn't seen Katie since she left the Blue Kingdom three years ago, where did she go? She wasn't in the Red Kingdom, she just. . .disappeared?

GUYS. this is my very first request Bot! I just checked my form today so sorry if it took a while, I'll be better at checking it from now on.

Genuinely what on earth was the finale

Anyway! Whoever requested this: I hope you enjoy it! Your idea was great!

Have a great day <333
